config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society works best when individual rights are protected first, because once the collective is allowed to override them too easily, it can justify abuse, censorship, and unfair treatment. In my view, the interests of society matter, but they should be balanced through laws that protect personal freedom and dignity. A healthy society is not one that sacrifices individuals too quickly, but one that solves shared problems without crushing people’s rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membatasi kebebasan dan menyalahgunakan kekuasaan. Hak individu harus menjadi batas utama, bukan penghalang yang bisa disingkirkan kapan saja oleh mayoritas. Namun, saya juga tidak setuju bahwa hak individu itu absolut tanpa pengecualian, karena ada situasi nyata seperti kesehatan publik, keselamatan, dan penegakan hukum yang memang membutuhkan pembatasan yang sangat ketat dan terukur. Jadi, prioritasnya seharusnya bukan masyarakat di atas individu, melainkan keseimbangan yang kuat dengan perlindungan hak sebagai fondasi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text:
The interests of society should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because that is exactly how abuse gets normalized. From my perspective as someone from Indonesia, I have seen how easily "for the common good" can become a convenient excuse for silencing criticism, mistreating minorities, or making arbitrary rules that ordinary people have to obey without real protection. Society does matter, but it should be built on rights, not on the idea that individuals can be sacrificed whenever the majority or the state says so.

At the same time, I do not think individual rights are absolute in every situation, because public health, safety, and disaster response sometimes require limited restrictions. But those limits must be narrow, transparent, and accountable, not a blank check. If we prioritize society first in a vague way, in practice the powerful usually define "society" for everyone else.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus berada di atas hak individu, karena bagi saya itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Dari pengalaman dan budaya politik di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat bahwa ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dijadikan alasan yang terlalu luas, hak minoritas, kebebasan berbicara, dan proses hukum sering jadi korban. Namun, saya juga tidak setuju kalau hak individu diperlakukan seolah-olah mutlak tanpa batas, karena ada keadaan seperti kesehatan publik dan keselamatan umum yang memang memerlukan pembatasan yang ketat. Jadi, menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi dasar utama, sementara kepentingan masyarakat hanya boleh membatasi secara sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support putting society’s interests above individual rights, because in Indonesia that kind of vague priority often ends up helping the powerful more than the public. When people say “for the common good,” it can easily become a cover for censorship, arbitrary enforcement, or ignoring minorities, and I have seen how dangerous that logic can be. At the same time, I do not believe rights are absolute in every case, because public health, disaster response, and safety sometimes require limited restrictions. But those limits should be specific, temporary, and accountable, with individual rights still treated as the default starting point rather than the thing society can override whenever it wants.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa sering alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk memperluas kekuasaan dan menekan kebebasan. Poin bahwa hak individu tidak absolut juga benar, tetapi itu justru mendukung batas yang sempit dan jelas, bukan memberi masyarakat cek kosong untuk mengalahkan individu kapan saja. Dalam praktiknya, “masyarakat” terlalu sering ditafsirkan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas, dan minoritaslah yang menanggung biayanya. Jadi bagi saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi dasar utama, sementara kepentingan publik hanya boleh membatasi secara sangat terukur dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
